chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C.P. No. D – 5845 of 2025 [Shabbir Aslam v. FOP & others] Petitioner: Shabbir Aslam son of Muhammad Aslam, who is present in person. Date of hearing: 18-12-2025 Date of decision: 18-12-2025 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – The petition is not only vague but also incoherent. It seems to us that the Petitioner has challenged the Pakistan Army (Amendment) Act, 2025. However, the challenge is not premised on any legal plane. Therefore, the petition is dismissed as misconceived. JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
